prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025 年理科（含物理类）最低位次依次为约 6650→5955→7561→7989→5001 名。2021–2024 年整体呈后移趋势（从 6650 后移至 7989），但 2025 年新高考首年（物理类）位次大幅前移至 5001 名，较 2024 年提前约 2988 名，波动显著。近 3 年（2023–2025）位次从 7561 前移至 5001，累计前移约 2560 名；该校在山西省理科（含物理类）招生计划：2021 年 138 人→2022 年 127 人→2023 年 123 人→2024 年 125 人→2025 年 130 人→2026 年113 人。2026 年较 2025 年缩招 17 人（-13.1%），缩招幅度较大，理论上使竞争略有缓解，位次有前移动力。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 南京理工大学为 211 工程、双一流建设高校，软科中国大学主榜排名近年稳定在 33–38 名区间，2026 年最新排名第 36 名，属全国顶尖理工类高校，层次稳固；该校声誉评价近年以中性/混合为主，未见明显负面舆情或投档断档记录；抖音热度排名第 65，评价为"一般"，短视频平台曝光量中等，未出现报考关注度异常升温信号；第五轮学科评估中，化学工程与技术获评 A+，光学工程、控制科学与工程、机械工程获评 A-。这些优势学科与该校在山西招生的电子信息类、自动化类、机械类、兵器类等专业高度对应，对相关专业报考有较强吸引力。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 计算机类、电子信息/通信、电气工程及其自动化等专业在 2024–2026 年持续处于"高热推荐"或"推荐"状态，热度稳定；山西省 2026 年物理类考生约 167419 人，较 2025 年 173347 人减少约 3.4%，考生规模小幅下降，竞争略有缓解；省控线方面，2025 年山西物理类本科批 419 分，较此前理科一批线有所下降，但属新高考模式切换的正常调整；南京理工大学位于江苏南京，属长三角核心城市，对山西考生有较强跨省吸引力；该校在山西招生人数占全国总招生比例约 4.7%（2025 年数据），属中等偏上水平。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合 2025 年位次大幅前移的基准、2026 年缩招 13.1% 带来的位次前移动力、学校排名小幅提升及优势学科吸引力，以及物理类考生总数小幅下降等因素，预计 2026 年位次在 2025 年基准 5001 名基础上继续前移，但缩招幅度较大使前移空间有限，且专业热度持续高位对位次有支撑作用。预测最低位次约 4629 名，区间 4129–5129 名。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for science (including physics category) were approximately 6650→5955→7561→7989→5001. From 2021 to 2024, the overall trend was backward (moving from 6650 to 7989), but in 2025, the first year of the new college entrance examination (physics category), the ranking significantly advanced to 5001, about 2988 places earlier than 2024, showing significant fluctuation. In the past 3 years (2023–2025), the ranking moved from 7561 to 5001, a cumulative advance of about 2560 places. The university's enrollment plan for science (including physics category) in Shanxi Province: 2021: 138 people → 2022: 127 people → 2023: 123 people → 2024: 125 people → 2025: 130 people → 2026: 113 people. In 2026, compared to 2025, enrollment decreased by 17 people (-13.1%), a relatively large reduction, which theoretically eases competition slightly and provides momentum for ranking advancement.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Nanjing University of Science and Technology is a 211 Project and Double First-Class construction university. Its main ranking on the Soft Science China University Rankings has been stable in the 33–38 range in recent years, with the latest ranking in 2026 being 36th, placing it among the top science and engineering universities in the country, with a solid level. Its reputation evaluation in recent years has been mainly neutral/mixed, with no obvious negative public opinion or record of enrollment gaps. Its Douyin popularity ranking is 65, rated as 'average', with moderate exposure on short video platforms, showing no abnormal increase in application attention. In the fifth round of discipline evaluation, Chemical Engineering and Technology was rated A+, and Optical Engineering, Control Science and Engineering, and Mechanical Engineering were rated A-. These advantageous disciplines closely correspond to the majors recruited in Shanxi, such as Electronic Information, Automation, Mechanical Engineering, and Weapons, providing strong appeal for related major applications.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Majors such as Computer Science, Electronic Information/Communication, and Electrical Engineering and Automation have been consistently in a 'highly recommended' or 'recommended' state from 2024 to 2026, with stable popularity. In 2026, the number of physics category examinees in Shanxi Province is about 167,419, a decrease of about 3.4% from 173,347 in 2025, with a slight decline in the examinee pool, easing competition slightly. Regarding the provincial control line, in 2025, the Shanxi physics category undergraduate batch line was 419 points, a decrease from the previous science first batch line, but this is a normal adjustment due to the switch to the new college entrance examination model. Nanjing University of Science and Technology is located in Nanjing, Jiangsu, a core city in the Yangtze River Delta, which has strong cross-provincial appeal for Shanxi examinees. The university's enrollment in Shanxi accounts for about 4.7% of its total national enrollment (2025 data), which is at an upper-middle level.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the significant advancement of rankings in 2025 as a baseline, the momentum for ranking advancement due to a 13.1% enrollment reduction in 2026, the slight improvement in university ranking and the appeal of advantageous disciplines, as well as the slight decrease in the total number of physics category examinees, it is expected that the ranking in 2026 will continue to advance from the 2025 baseline of 5001. However, the relatively large enrollment reduction limits the room for advancement, and the sustained high popularity of majors supports the ranking. The predicted minimum ranking is approximately 4629, with a range of 4129–5129.

major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: If your ranking is within the predicted range (42404–43404), it is recommended to focus on Tier 2 majors as the main force, aim for Tier 1 majors as a stretch, and use Tier 3 majors as safety options. If your ranking is significantly better than the lower limit of the range (<42404), you can focus on aiming for popular engineering majors such as Software Engineering, Computer Science, and Electronic Information. If your ranking is close to the upper limit of the range (>43404), you should mainly rely on Tier 3 majors to ensure admission. Note that majors in biology, chemistry, environment, and materials have relatively low social popularity, so consider personal interests when applying.

prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025年历史类最低位次分别为约4213名→4703名→5349名→5289名→5433名，整体呈后移趋势，近4年累计后移约1220名；2025年基准位次约5433名；该校在湖南省历史类招生计划2021年12人、2022年11人、2023年11人、2024年16人、2025年17人、2026年18人，近年持续小幅扩招，2026年较2025年增加1人（+5. 9%），扩招幅度有限，对竞争格局影响较小。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 贵州大学为211工程、双一流建设高校；软科中国大学排名持续上升，2021年第135名→2026年第85名，近年排名提 升显著，学校综合实力和认可度稳步增强；2026年声誉评价为偏负面，主要因招聘公告中设置不当条件引发舆情，学校已终止招聘并致歉，对报考心理影响有限；抖音热度排名第76位（综合热度341363），评价为一般，短视频曝光量处于中等水平，未见明显报考关注升温信号；无历史投档断档记录；第五轮学科评估中 植物保护获评A-，为该校唯一A-及以上学科，与招生专业中的生物科学类、化学类等有一定关联，但整体优势学科数量较少。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 计算机类、电子信息/通信 、电气工程等工科专业社会热度持续偏高；法学、汉语言文学等文科专业热度平稳；本省历史类考生数2025年142547人→2026年187000人，增幅约31.2%，竞争显著加剧；省控线20 25年历史类本科批446分，较2024年438分上升，反映整体竞争趋紧；贵州大学位于贵州省，在湖南省属跨省招生，无本地保护性倾斜；该校在湖南省招生人数占 比较小（近年约占总招生1%-2%），地域偏好因素影响有限。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合历年位次持续后移趋势、2026年历史类考生数大幅增加（+31.2%）带来的竞争加剧、招生计划 仅小幅扩招（+5.9%）不足以对冲考生增量、以及学校排名上升带来的吸引力增强，在2025年基准5433名基础上预计位次继续后移；预测最低位次约5775名，区间5275–6275名。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for History Category were approximately 4213 → 4703 → 5349 → 5289 → 5433, showing an overall backward trend, with a cumulative backward shift of about 1220 positions over the past 4 years; the baseline ranking for 2025 is about 5433; the enrollment plan for History Category in Hunan Province was 12 in 2021, 11 in 2022, 11 in 2023, 16 in 2024, 17 in 2025, and 18 in 2026, with a continuous slight expansion in recent years, with an increase of 1 person (+5.9%) from 2025 to 2026, a limited expansion that has a minor impact on the competitive landscape.

学校层次与声誉.title: School Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Guizhou University is a 211 Project and Double First-Class construction university; its ranking in the Soft Science China University Rankings has been continuously rising, from 135th in 2021 to 85th in 2026, with significant improvement in recent years, steadily enhancing the university's comprehensive strength and recognition; the reputation evaluation for 2026 is slightly negative, mainly due to inappropriate conditions set in recruitment announcements causing public opinion, but the university has terminated the recruitment and apologized, with limited impact on application psychology; Douyin popularity ranking is 76th (comprehensive popularity 341363), rated as average, with short video exposure at a medium level, showing no obvious signs of increased application attention; no historical record of admission gaps; in the fifth round of discipline evaluation, Plant Protection was rated A-, the only A- or above discipline at the university, which has some relevance to majors like Biological Sciences and Chemistry in the enrollment, but the overall number of advantageous disciplines is limited.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Engineering majors such as Computer Science, Electronic Information/Communication, and Electrical Engineering have consistently high social popularity; liberal arts majors like Law and Chinese Language and Literature have stable popularity; the number of History Category candidates in the province was 142,547 in 2025 → 187,000 in 2026, an increase of about 31.2%, significantly intensifying competition; the provincial control line for History Category undergraduate batch in 2025 was 446 points, up from 438 points in 2024, reflecting tighter overall competition; Guizhou University is located in Guizhou Province, with cross-provincial enrollment in Hunan Province, without local protection bias; the university's enrollment proportion in Hunan Province is relatively small (about 1%-2% of total enrollment in recent years), so regional preference factors have limited impact.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the continuous backward trend of historical rankings, the significant increase in History Category candidates in 2026 (+31.2%) leading to intensified competition, the limited expansion of enrollment plan (+5.9%) insufficient to offset the increase in candidates, and the enhanced attractiveness due to the university's rising ranking, the ranking is expected to continue moving backward based on the 2025 baseline of 5433; the predicted minimum ranking is about 5775, with a range of 5275–6275.
